name: preset-diagnostic-bricks
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 — 'diagnostic-bricks' preset. Atlas eval + brick wireframes + cascade overlay + cascade-allocation viz coloring. Locks atomMode/vizMode/overlays propagation.

setup.vlmDescription: An SDF teapot with visible brick-allocation wireframes and cascade volume overlay. The surface itself is colored by which cascade contains each pixel (blue, teal, orange shading per cascade band). Diagnostic look.
